tiles.title: Zellige Ocean Blue
tiles.description: Authentic hand-cut Zellige tiles from Fez, Morocco. Each tile is individually crafted by master artisans, creating a unique rippled surface that catches light beautifully.
tiles.creator: Fez Artisan Collective

tiles.title: Zellige Terracotta Blush
tiles.description: Warm blush-toned Zellige tiles handmade in the medinas of Marrakech. The soft terracotta hue and irregular glaze give each tile a painterly, one-of-a-kind quality.
tiles.creator: Medina Craft Studio

tiles.title: Zellige Midnight Emerald
tiles.description: Deep emerald Zellige tiles fired using centuries-old Moorish techniques. The lustrous surface shifts between forest green and black depending on the light angle.
tiles.creator: Fez Artisan Collective

tiles.title: Carrara White Marble
tiles.description: Quarried from the legendary Carrara mountains of Tuscany. The soft white ground with delicate grey veining makes it a timeless choice for luxury interiors.
tiles.creator: Tuscany Stone Co.

tiles.title: Nero Marquina Marble
tiles.description: Dramatic black marble with vivid white veining from the Basque quarries of Spain. Its bold contrast creates a striking statement in any luxury space.
tiles.creator: Iberian Stone Guild

tiles.title: Crema Marfil Marble
tiles.description: Warm ivory marble with golden and beige tones from Alicante. Its subtle veining creates an understated elegance perfect for grand living spaces.
tiles.creator: Iberian Stone Guild

tiles.title: Rustic Terracotta Heritage
tiles.description: Sun-dried and kiln-fired using ancient Andalusian methods. This terracotta brings warmth and earthy authenticity to any floor.
tiles.creator: Casa del Barro

tiles.title: Tuscan Terracotta Cotto
tiles.description: Traditional Italian cotto tiles from Impruneta, renowned for their rich orange-red hue and remarkable frost resistance. Favoured by architects across Europe.
tiles.creator: Fornace Impruneta

tiles.title: Glazed Terracotta Cobalt
tiles.description: Hand-glazed terracotta tiles with a vivid cobalt blue finish inspired by Portuguese azulejo traditions. Brings Mediterranean colour to kitchen splashbacks.
tiles.creator: Atelier Azul

tiles.title: Forest Slate Mosaic
tiles.description: Sourced from the slate-rich highlands of Rajasthan. The deep green undertones evoke a sense of forest floor serenity.
tiles.creator: Rajasthan Stone Works

tiles.title: Sandstone Desert Gold
tiles.description: Warm amber sandstone quarried from the Red Sea hills of Egypt. Its golden tones and subtle fossil inclusions make every slab a geological artwork.
tiles.creator: Nile Stone Co.

tiles.title: Basalt Black Lava
tiles.description: Volcanic basalt tiles from the Auvergne region of France. The dense, micro-crystalline surface is virtually impermeable and exceptionally durable.
tiles.creator: Pierre Volcanique

tiles.title: Geometric Ceramic Clay
tiles.description: Precision-moulded geometric patterns pressed from fine white clay and fired at 1200°C. The matte glaze works beautifully as a feature wall.
tiles.creator: Estudio Valencia

tiles.title: Handpainted Talavera
tiles.description: Each tile is individually painted by hand following 16th-century Talavera traditions. Bold floral and geometric motifs in cobalt and white make a vivid statement.
tiles.creator: Taller Talavera Real

tiles.title: Ripple Ceramic Pearl
tiles.description: Soft wave-textured ceramic tiles with a pearlescent glaze that shimmers with movement. Inspired by coastal light reflecting off shallow water.
tiles.creator: Faenza Studio

tiles.title: Industrial Cement Grey
tiles.description: Poured and pressed using Portland cement blend. The uniform grey surface offers raw industrial elegance.
tiles.creator: Studio Beton

tiles.title: Cement Encaustic Deco
tiles.description: Art Deco patterned cement tiles with inlaid pigment pressed under hydraulic pressure. Each tile captures the geometry and glamour of 1920s Parisian interiors.
tiles.creator: Atelier du Carreau

tiles.title: Micro Cement Ash White
tiles.description: Ultra-thin micro cement tiles with a seamless, contemporary look. The ash white tone is warm yet neutral, ideal for minimalist loft and spa environments.
tiles.creator: Studio Beton

tiles.title: Sage Green Encaustic
tiles.description: Traditional encaustic tiles hand-poured with pigmented cement layers. The sage green palette creates a calming atmosphere.
tiles.creator: Maison Carreaux

tiles.title: Encaustic Indigo Bloom
tiles.description: Deeply pigmented indigo encaustic tiles with floral botanical inlay. Hand-poured in small batches in Lisbon, each piece is a wearable work of decorative art.
tiles.creator: Casa Encáustica

tiles.title: Encaustic Rust Geometry
tiles.description: Bold rust and cream geometric encaustic tiles inspired by North African Berber textiles. Hydraulic-pressed in Morocco with traditional mineral pigments.
tiles.creator: Atlas Carreaux
